description: Wikipedia is a free online encyclopedia made up of collaboratively edited articles in many languages. It is operated as part of the Wikimedia ecosystem and serves encyclopedic content and related media to readers worldwide.
summary: wikipedia.org exposes two public developer-facing HTTP APIs on its language subdomains: the MediaWiki Action API and the MediaWiki REST API; no first-party GraphQL API, MCP server, or CLI was found on wikipedia.org.
